# Forge Tool - أدوات PDF

> موقع عربي مجاني يحتوي على أكثر من 25 أداة PDF تعمل مباشرة في المتصفح بدون تسجيل أو تحميل.

## About
Forge Tool (فورج دول) is a free, browser-based PDF toolkit for Arabic-speaking users.
All tools run client-side — files never leave the user's device.

## Pages
- Home: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/
- About: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/about.html
- Contact: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/contact.html
- Privacy: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/privacy.html
- Terms: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/terms.html
- FAQ: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/faq.html
- Blog: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/blog.html

## Main Tools
- Merge PDF: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/merge-pdf.html
- Split PDF: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/split-pdf.html
- Compress PDF: https://hdi292.github.io/forge-tool/pages/compress-pdf.html
- Organize PDF pages
- Remove pages from PDF
- Repair PDF
- Convert Word / Excel / PowerPoint / JPG / HTML / EPUB → PDF
- Convert PDF → Word / Excel / PowerPoint / JPG

## Tech
- Pure HTML/CSS/JS (no backend required for v1)
- Google Fonts: Cairo
- Hosted on GitHub Pages
- AdSense-ready (after approval)
